use_cases: Interactive hero headings with cursor-following glow effects
Engaging CTA buttons with hover reveal animations
Navigation menu items with gradient highlights on hover
Feature cards with text that reveals color on interaction
Landing page typography with premium feel
ai_summary: A cursor-reactive text hover effect that reveals a vibrant purple-to-pink gradient glow following the mouse position. Built with SVG masks and Framer Motion for smooth animations, this component creates an engaging interactive typography experience ideal for modern SaaS landing pages and creative portfolios.
